sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63499" key="liperga/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐπεργάτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n63499.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unemployed labourer</tr_> (s.v.l.), <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λιπερνήτης</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
